lblSubTitle: Explore the Rich Horticultural Heritage & Elite Indigenous Cultivars of Bihar
lblWelcomeBody: Touch any mango variety below to open its rich, interactive digital profile dashboard. Discover scientific highlights, accurate nutritional metrics, and regional audio guide narrations spoken in your preferred language.
lblTableNote: * Parameters compiled from standard regional performance targets. Actual metrics vary dynamically based on agronomic conditions.
lblFooterText:
Government of Bihar
Directorate of Horticulture

Bihar Smart Mango Knowledge Wall | Aam Mahotsav 2026
lblKioskAudioText: 🎙️ Press for Exhibition Hall Overview Audio Guide / प्रदर्शिनी कक्ष विवरण हेतु यहाँ दबाएं:
lblQrText: Scan QR Code to explore variety profile
lblKioskNarration: Welcome to the Bihar Smart Mango Knowledge Wall Exhibition Hub. Touch any native cultivar card below or scan its custom QR code using your mobile device to view comprehensive laboratory profiles, analytical sugar brix scales, and target nutritional values.

dudhiyamaldah.title: Dudhiya Malda
dudhiyamaldah.tagline: The ultimate connoisseur variety of Digha, Patna
dudhiyamaldah.subTag: Exceptionally fiberless with a translucent skin and divine sweet scent
dudhiyamaldah.flavorVal: Intensely Luscious, Honey-Sweet Sugar and Milky-Floral Overtones
dudhiyamaldah.fiberVal: Absolutely Zero Fiber, Pure Silk Experience
dudhiyamaldah.utilityVal: Ultra-Premium Dessert Table Fruit of Unrivaled Prestige
dudhiyamaldah.ripeningVal: Uniform Natural Mid-Season Ripening with Distinctive Aroma Release
dudhiyamaldah.growthVal: Symmetric Canopy, Excellent Foliage Density with Prolific Bearing
dudhiyamaldah.goalVal: Exquisite Flavor Profile, High Pulp-to-Seed Ratio, and Elite Status
dudhiyamaldah.fruitTypeVal: Large Oval, Distinctive Pale Yellow-Green with Translucent Skin
dudhiyamaldah.narration: Welcome to the Smart Mango Knowledge Wall. You are exploring the legendary Dudhiya Malda of Digha, Patna—universally recognized as the unparalleled king of gourmet mangoes in Bihar. Known for its ultra-thin, jade-green skin that carries a unique, delicate milky white bloom, this exceptional variety offers a completely fiberless, buttery texture. Its intensely rich sugar profile and deep, mesmerizing aroma make it the ultimate prized favorite among mango enthusiasts.

bombai.title: Bombai
bombai.tagline: The early-season market favorite of North Bihar
bombai.subTag: Known for its distinct green-yellow peel and highly aromatic tangy sweetness
bombai.flavorVal: Bright Tangy Sweetness with Captivating Fruity Esters
bombai.textureVal: Firm, Juicy with Extremely Light Playful Fiber
bombai.utilityVal: Excellent Early Commercial Shipping Table Fruit
bombai.ripeningVal: Early Uniform Color Transition across Orchards
bombai.growthVal: Robust Expansion Rate, High Resistance to Seasonal Stresses
bombai.goalVal: Early Market Window Dominance and Dependable Yield Ratios
bombai.fruitTypeVal: Medium Oblong, Attractive Crimson Blush at the Shoulders
bombai.pulpVal: Bright Lemon Yellow to Orange Saffron Tint
bombai.narration: You are learning about Bombai, the legendary early-season pioneer of Bihar's orchards. This variety satisfies the winter-long wait for fresh mangoes, bringing a vibrant sweet-and-sour depth that signals the peak of summer.

jardalu.title: Jardalu
jardalu.subTag: Instantly recognizable by its striking golden yellow hue and unique aroma
jardalu.plantType: Medium Vigor, Dense Symmetric Rounded Crown
jardalu.flavorVal: Highly Unique Incense-Like Sweetness with Soft Notes
jardalu.textureVal: Fine and Very Melting, Uniform Fiberless Character
jardalu.utilityVal: Elite Gifting and International Export Ambassador Asset
jardalu.ripeningVal: Quick Natural Curing with Intensive Scent Amplification
jardalu.growthVal: Consistent Annual Cropper with Reliable Canopy Density
jardalu.goalVal: GI Quality Safeguarding and Superior Sensory Differentiation
jardalu.fruitTypeVal: Medium Oval, True Bright Chrome-Yellow Satin Finish
jardalu.narration: This is the GI-tagged Jardalu of Bhagalpur. Renowned for its unique, alluring aroma that resembles premium traditional incense, its uniform canary-yellow color makes it a favorite on international tables.

langra.title: Langra
langra.tagline: Intensely sweet with a sharp, unforgettable flavor
langra.subTag: Retains its green skin even when fully mature and ready to slice
langra.plantType: Highly Vigorous, Tall Open Spreading Canopy
langra.flavorVal: Intensely Rich, High Acid-Sugar Harmonious Balance
langra.textureVal: Soft, Meaty, Meltingly Smooth Cream Core
langra.utilityVal: Premium Commercial Dessert and Processing King
langra.ripeningVal: Stays Leaf-Green Outwardly While Inner Pulp Deepens Natural Sugars
langra.growthVal: Strong Trunk Structure with Excellent Foliage Spread
langra.goalVal: Maximum Bumper Crop Biomass and High Commercial Shelf-Value
langra.fruitTypeVal: Oval-Round, Medium to Large Olive-Green Form Factor
langra.narration: Discover the incredible Langra variety. Celebrated for maintaining a bright green skin even when perfectly ripe, it conceals an intense, rich, high-brix golden pulp that remains unforgettable.

chausa.title: Chausa
chausa.subTag: Exceptionally juicy pulp with a high brix sweetness index
chausa.plantType: Vigorous, Upright Trunk with Pyramidal Crown
chausa.textureVal: Highly Juicy, Meltingly Soft, Soft Sucking Pulp Type
chausa.fiberVal: Minimal, Confined purely around the inner seed wall
chausa.utilityVal: Unrivaled Late-Season Table Fresh Consumer King
chausa.ripeningVal: Develops a Beautiful Bright Golden Yellow Peel on Full Maturity
chausa.growthVal: Extremely Hardy, Resilient to Late Summer High Winds
chausa.goalVal: Extending the Mango Season Window with Premium Pricing Value
chausa.fruitTypeVal: Large Oval-Oblong, Frequently Golden Uniform Color
chausa.narration: This is Chausa, the late-summer ruler of sweets. When other varieties fade, Chausa hits the markets with a rich, syrup-like honeyed nectar that delivers unmatched brix levels.

amrapali.title: Amrapali
amrapali.subTag: Known for its intense, deep orange pulp and extraordinarily rich beta-carotene
amrapali.origin: Institutional Selection, adapted state-wide across Bihar
amrapali.plantType: Dwarf, Compact, High-Density Orchard Design Fit
amrapali.flavorVal: Thick, Heavy Rich Sweetness with Assertive Musky Nuances
amrapali.textureVal: Extremely Smooth, Firm Paste Density, Zero Fiber Trace
amrapali.utilityVal: Top-Tier Nectar/Pulp Industry Crop and Kitchen Gardens
amrapali.ripeningVal: Slow, Reliable Shelf Aging Without Internal Quality Degradation
amrapali.growthVal: Highly Prolific Regular Annual Bearer (No Alternate Bearing)
amrapali.goalVal: Maximum Yield per Hectare via Advanced Intensive Cultivation
amrapali.fruitTypeVal: Small to Medium Oblong, Deep Green Exterior Skin
amrapali.narration: This is the brilliant hybrid Amrapali. Specially engineered for high-density orchards, its dwarf stature yields magnificent clusters containing deep orange-red pulp that boasts the highest beta-carotene content.

fazli.title: Fazli
fazli.subTag: Extensively utilized in commercial food processing pipelines
fazli.plantType: Massive Vigorous Tree, Giant Wide-Spreading Shade
fazli.flavorVal: Mild, Refreshing Sweetness with Light Pleasant Acidity Notes
fazli.textureVal: Coarser, Large Meaty Flesh Blocks with Soft Juiciness
fazli.fiberVal: Low to Moderate near the seed margin
fazli.utilityVal: High-Value Industrial Chutneys, Pickles, and Processing Pulp Base
fazli.ripeningVal: Gradual, Allowing Long Transit Windows across India
fazli.growthVal: Extremely Durable Wood Structure with Massive Leaf Surface Area
fazli.goalVal: Bulk Biomass Production and Industrial Supply Consistency
fazli.fruitTypeVal: Gigantic Oblong-Oval shape, often exceeding 700-900 grams
fazli.narration: Meet the giant Fazli. Closing out the summer season, these massive fruits are an industrial dream, valued for bulk processing into world-class preserves and nectars due to their incredible size and flesh ratio.

gulabkhas.title: Gulabkhas
gulabkhas.tagline: Prized for its gorgeous rosy-pink skin blush
gulabkhas.subTag: A unique, light rose-water flavor note across its juicy pulp
gulabkhas.plantType: Moderately Slender, Elegant Upright Branch Architecture
gulabkhas.flavorVal: Exquisite Subtly Sweet with unmistakable Rose-Water Essence
gulabkhas.textureVal: Soft, Fine Grained, Meltingly Juicy Structure
gulabkhas.ripeningVal: Fragrance intensifies sharply 48 hours before turning golden
gulabkhas.growthVal: Delicate Initial Footprint setting into Reliable Mid-Life Yields
gulabkhas.goalVal: High-Value Niche Exotic Aesthetic and Flavor Safeguarding
gulabkhas.fruitTypeVal: Medium Oblong, Striking Reddish-Pink Rose Shoulder Patch
gulabkhas.narration: You are exploring Gulabkhas. Famed for its pink blush on its shoulders, it boasts a gentle, rose-water-infused flavor profile that has earned it an elite status at culinary dessert exhibitions.

maldah.title: Maldah
maldah.tagline: The widespread benchmark commercial variety of Bihar
maldah.subTag: Deeply sweet, meat-heavy pulp with reliable yields
maldah.flavorVal: Classic Dynamic Mango Sweetness with High Sugar Content
maldah.textureVal: Thick, Meaty, Satisfying Substantial Core Density
maldah.utilityVal: The Standard Household Choice for Direct Table Eating
maldah.ripeningVal: Excellent Natural Shelf Balance for Transport Safety
maldah.growthVal: Highly Reliable Crop Volume Return Rates Every Season
maldah.goalVal: Staple Market Availability and Standard Price-to-Quality Leadership
maldah.fruitTypeVal: Large Roundish Oval, Matte Dull-Greenish Yellow Profile
maldah.narration: This is the classic Maldah, the absolute baseline benchmark for pure mango sweetness across household markets in Bihar. Its predictable bumper yield and rich pulp set the baseline for standard high-quality summer fruit.

sipahiya.title: Sipahiya
sipahiya.subTag: Holding an exceptional local legacy value among heritage orchards
sipahiya.flavorVal: Unique Local Heritage Tang and Deep Sweet Interplay
sipahiya.textureVal: Firm Flesh with Good Elasticity and Decent Juice Hold
sipahiya.fiberVal: Low to Moderate, Structurally Sound Fibers
sipahiya.utilityVal: Heritage Protection and Localized Niche Market Offerings
sipahiya.ripeningVal: Extremely Stable Ripening, Highly Resistant to Rotting
sipahiya.growthVal: Sturdy Rooting Architecture with Superior Pest Tolerance
sipahiya.goalVal: Preservation of Indigenous Genetic Strains within State Registers
sipahiya.fruitTypeVal: Medium Symmetrical Oval, Hardy Protective Peel Coating
sipahiya.narration: This is Sipahiya, an indigenous treasure. It stands as a testament to the biological diversity of Bihar's heritage orchards, presenting a robust, classic local flavor profile that is highly resilient to pests.

sukul.title: Sukul
sukul.tagline: A popular local favorite prized for its thirst-quenching juice quality
sukul.subTag: Reliable home-processing properties and traditional legacy value
sukul.plantType: Broadly Spreading, Open and Accessible Branches
sukul.flavorVal: Rich, High Refreshment Value, Soul-Satisfying Juice Nectar
sukul.textureVal: Highly Fluid Core, Ideal for Direct Manual Squeezing
sukul.utilityVal: Traditional Family Sucking Type Mango and Home Juicing
sukul.ripeningVal: Matures and Softens Evenly with High Fluid Generation
sukul.growthVal: Prolific and Reliable, Abundant Cluster Fruit Bearer
sukul.goalVal: Community Orchard Security and Household Preservation Use
sukul.fruitTypeVal: Roundish Oval Form Factor with Smooth External Textures
sukul.narration: Step up to the traditional favorite, Sukul. Highly valued across rural communities, its intensely fluid and juicy core is engineered by nature for direct manual squeezing and classic home-style fresh juice preparation.
